name: grid-table-editor
description: A simple Data Table Editor that generates Markdown, CSV or JSON. It can also be used to interchange data between the formats, supporting editing in the grid.

scripts.lint: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json . -A all -D array-callback-return -D eqeqeq -D no-undef -D no-inner-declarations --deny-warnings && biome lint .
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint -c .oxlintrc.json . -A all -D array-callback-return -D eqeqeq -D no-undef -D no-inner-declarations --deny-warnings --fix
scripts.fallow: pnpm run fallow:health && pnpm run fallow:dupes && pnpm run fallow:dead-code
scripts.fallow:ci: pnpm run fallow:health:ci && pnpm run fallow:dupes:ci && pnpm run fallow:dead-code
scripts.format: oxfmt --write AGENTS.md PACKAGE_MANAGER_POLICY.md README.md .github/copilot-instructions.md .github/workflows/*.yml .storybook/**/*.js .vscode/launch.json ast-grep/**/*.yml babel.config.cjs biome.json jest.config.cjs package.json playwright-api.config.js playwright.config.js pnpm-workspace.yaml sgconfig.yml vitest.config.mjs apps/**/*.js apps/**/*.json apps/**/*.mjs !apps/web/dist/**/*.js !apps/web/dist/**/*.mjs !apps/web/libs/**/*.js packages/**/*.js packages/**/*.json packages/**/*.mjs !packages/core/js/libs/**/*.js scripts/**/*.js scripts/**/*.mjs tests/**/*.js tests/**/*.cjs
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check AGENTS.md PACKAGE_MANAGER_POLICY.md README.md .github/copilot-instructions.md .github/workflows/*.yml .storybook/**/*.js .vscode/launch.json ast-grep/**/*.yml babel.config.cjs biome.json jest.config.cjs package.json playwright-api.config.js playwright.config.js pnpm-workspace.yaml sgconfig.yml vitest.config.mjs apps/**/*.js apps/**/*.json apps/**/*.mjs !apps/web/dist/**/*.js !apps/web/dist/**/*.mjs !apps/web/libs/**/*.js packages/**/*.js packages/**/*.json packages/**/*.mjs !packages/core/js/libs/**/*.js scripts/**/*.js scripts/**/*.mjs tests/**/*.js tests/**/*.cjs
scripts.verify:ui: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run test:ui:jest && pnpm run test:storybook && pnpm run build-storybook && pnpm run test:browser
scripts.verify:local: pnpm run lint && pnpm run ast-grep && pnpm run format:check && pnpm test && pnpm run test:workspaces && pnpm run test:storybook && pnpm run build-storybook && pnpm run test:api
scripts.verify:ci:pr: pnpm run lint && pnpm run ast-grep && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run fallow:ci && pnpm test && pnpm run test:workspaces && pnpm run test:storybook && pnpm run build-storybook && pnpm run lint:docker && pnpm run test:browser && pnpm run test:api
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run ast-grep && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run fallow:ci && pnpm run testcoverage && pnpm run test:workspaces && pnpm run test:storybook && pnpm run build-storybook && pnpm run lint:docker && pnpm run test:browser && pnpm run test:api
scripts.anywaydata:mac: pnpm --dir docs-src run anywaydata && pnpm run build:web && node ./scripts/merge-web-build-into-docs-build.js && cp -R ./build/ ../../anywaydata-com
scripts.anywaydata:win: pnpm --dir docs-src run anywaydata && pnpm run build:web && node .\scripts\merge-web-build-into-docs-build.js && echo cleaning anywaydata for deployment && ..\anywaydata-com\make-ready-for-prod.bat

author: Alan Richardson
